title: Songs She Wrote About People She Knows
original_title: Songs She Wrote About People She Knows
overview: A timid officer worker becomes both pariah and Pied Piper when she unleashes her confessional, scathingly honest pop compositions upon friends and co-workers, in this hilarious comedy from Vancouver’s Kris Elgstrand (Doppelgänger Paul).
